identity: Human female warlock, young, long dark brown hair falling forward from beneath a deep purple hood, dark brown eyes, cool unreadable expression.
outfit: Deep purple hooded cloak with a round gold clasp at the throat, dark inner robe, purple inner hood lining.
weapons: A heavy leather-bound grimoire with gold corners and a large round purple gemstone set in the center of the front cover, held in the left hand across the body.
attackStyle: East-facing. Grimoire open in the left hand, right hand thrust forward casting a jet of dark purple eldritch flame.
spellStyle: East-facing. Grimoire held in the left hand at chest height, right palm raised with a floating purple rune above it.
blockStyle: East-facing. Grimoire held across the chest in both hands as a guard, hood up, faint purple shimmer.
koStyle: East-facing, kneeling, grimoire fallen open beside her, head bowed, hood slumped.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), calm hooded idle. Grimoire held against the chest in the left arm, right hand at her side.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Deep purple hood, long dark brown hair, round gold clasp at throat, heavy leather grimoire with a round purple gemstone on the cover held at her chest.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Human female warlock, young, long dark brown hair falling forward from beneath a deep purple hood, dark brown eyes, cool unreadable expression.

OUTFIT: Deep purple hooded cloak with a round gold clasp at the throat, dark inner robe, purple inner hood lining.

WEAPONS: A heavy leather-bound grimoire with gold corners and a large round purple gemstone set in the center of the front cover, held in the left hand across the body.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Human female warlock, young, long dark brown hair falling forward from beneath a deep purple hood, dark brown eyes, cool unreadable expression.

OUTFIT: Deep purple hooded cloak with a round gold clasp at the throat, dark inner robe, purple inner hood lining.

WEAPONS: A heavy leather-bound grimoire with gold corners and a large round purple gemstone set in the center of the front cover, held in the left hand across the body.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Deep purple hood, long dark brown hair, round gold clasp at throat, heavy leather grimoire with a round purple gemstone on the cover held at her chest.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
